text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek trains hard in preparation for the
Sumire Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to win three races in the Classics just to
make me smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that goal in mind, she continues to secretly
put in extra effort to further her abilities.
